implementation: Always design mobile-first then expand with md: lg: xl: prefixes
Use max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 for consistent container
Use Tailwind spacing scale: p-4 p-6 p-8 gap-4 gap-6
Minimum text-base (16px) for body text-sm for secondary
Use semantic color names: primary secondary accent not raw colors
Include all states: hover focus active disabled
Always pair inputs with labels use sr-only if visual label hidden
Use flex items-center justify-center for centering
Define mobile columns first then larger: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3
Use w-full h-auto object-cover for responsive images
Always include focus:ring-2 focus:ring-offset-2 on interactive elements
Use transition-all duration-200 for smooth state changes
Prefer opacity or color changes over scale transforms
Support dark mode with dark: prefix
Higher opacity for light mode glass effects
Ensure borders visible in both modes
Ensure text contrast: gray-900 on light gray-100 on dark
Add cursor-pointer and hover state to clickable cards
Use floating navbar with spacing
example: class="fixed top-4 left-4 right-4 z-50 rounded-2xl"

implementation: Follow z-index scale: 10 dropdown 20 sticky 30 modal 50 toast
Prevent horizontal overflow use overflow-x-hidden on body
Respect reduced motion preference
Use consistent icon sizing w-5 h-5 inline w-6 h-6 standard
Minimum touch target 44x44px use p-3 or min-h-11
Use animate-pulse for skeleton loading states
